name: toolchain alternatives: for a gcp target the GKE container option is marked platform-native
command:
cat > hg.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"gcp","iac_targets":["terraform"]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff hg.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const R=j.recommendations;const cat=c=>R.find(r=>r.category===c);process.exit(cat("containers").alternatives.find(a=>a.tool==="google-gke").platform_native===true?0:1)' && echo gcp-native 1>&2
